STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — Internal Legal/Compliance Memorandum (non-public); Embargoed until 15 Jul 2026 08:30 MYT
To: Board of Tunas Meridian Berhad; Attn: Encik Hafiz Rahman (Chair), Puan Nor Aini (IR) — contact: legal@tunasmeridianbhd.my, +60 1 1 6 8 8 4 0 2 1 0
Re: Project Durian Mist — proposed acquisition of 15.4% in Pacific Tera Sdn Bhd and MYR 128,500,000 secured term financing (the Financing)
This memo contains MNPI under the CMSA and PDPA-relevant personal data; not for circulation or public announcement on the Exchange until the embargo lifts
Board is asked to approve execution of definitive S u b s c r i p t i o n   A g r e e m e n t and Share Sale Agreement (SSA Ref: TM/SSA/2 0 2 6 - 0 6) by 03 Jun 2026
Facility Agreement term sheet (link: http://docs.tunas-meridianbhd.my/Project-Durian-Mist/term_sheet%3Dv2.1) sets margin at COF+2.15% with drawdown cap MYR 90,000,000 in Tranche A
MAC/MAE: for clarity, changes in general Malaysian economic conditions shall not constitute a material adverse change; however, a rating downgrade of the Group would trigger a step-up
Public reference only: see 2023 annual report overview at https://ir.tunas-meridianbhd.my/reports/FY2023.pdf (already in the public domain, not price-sensitive)

Checklist items: verification of beneficial ownership, stamping duty estimate MYR 1,240,000, board minutes notarisation, and intercreditor deed finalisation by 12 Jun 2026
Payment instructions (escrow): Acct MY-88 0 0 2 1 4--9 7 held with Sunriver Trust Co.; do not circulate account details beyond deal team
